description_long: This bungalow features a low-pitched, broad hip roof with a central raised section, giving it a distinctive profile. The structure is surrounded by a well-manicured lawn, two rectangular reflecting pools, and mature trees flanking the building. The front facade includes a covered porch area supported by columns, with large glass doors and windows providing ample natural light. The exterior walls are finished in a light color, contrasting with the darker roof and wooden trim. A stone or paved pathway leads symmetrically from the street to the entrance, enhancing the sense of approach. The overall design is modern yet rooted in classic bungalow proportions, emphasizing horizontal lines and integration with the landscape.
description: A modern bungalow with a broad hip roof, central raised section, large windows, and a covered porch, set amid lawns, pools, and trees.
description_view_0: Top-down angled view showing the hip roof, central raised section, two pools, and the full landscape layout.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the covered porch, symmetrical windows, and the approach path flanked by trees.
description_view_2: Rear angled view showing the back of the bungalow, roof details, and the side landscaping.
description_view_3: Direct rear view with a clear look at the porch, large glass doors, and the twin pools leading up to the house.
